'''âm-v-p''' ('''kamavap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:starburst|starburst]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:starburst|starburst]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-v-p
|-
! Lemma
| kamavap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimavap|thimavap]] || [[word:jimavap|jimavap]] || [[word:shimavap|shimavap]] || [[word:kimavap|kimavap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumavap|thuthumavap]] || [[word:jujumavap|jujumavap]] || [[word:shushumavap|shushumavap]] || [[word:kukumavap|kukumavap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumavap|thumavap]] || [[word:jumavap|jumavap]] || [[word:shumavap|shumavap]] || [[word:kumavap|kumavap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumavap|thumavap]] || [[word:jumavap|jumavap]] || [[word:shumavap|shumavap]] || [[word:kumavap|kumavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themavap|themavap]] || [[word:jemavap|jemavap]] || [[word:shemavap|shemavap]] || [[word:kemavap|kemavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomavap|thothomavap]] || [[word:jojomavap|jojomavap]] || [[word:shoshomavap|shoshomavap]] || [[word:kokomavap|kokomavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomavap|thomavap]] || [[word:jomavap|jomavap]] || [[word:shomavap|shomavap]] || [[word:komavap|komavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomavap|thomavap]] || [[word:jomavap|jomavap]] || [[word:shomavap|shomavap]] || [[word:komavap|komavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmavap|thĂŠmavap]] || [[word:jĂŠmavap|jĂŠmavap]] || [[word:shĂŠmavap|shĂŠmavap]] || [[word:kĂŠmavap|kĂŠmavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamavap|thathamavap]] || [[word:jajamavap|jajamavap]] || [[word:shashamavap|shashamavap]] || [[word:kakamavap|kakamavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamavap|thamavap]] || [[word:jamavap|jamavap]] || [[word:shamavap|shamavap]] || [[word:kamavap|kamavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamavap|thamavap]] || [[word:jamavap|jamavap]] || [[word:shamavap|shamavap]] || [[word:kamavap|kamavap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamavap|shamavap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamavap|goshamavap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamavap|gokishamavap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamavapnĂŒ|shamavapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamavapnknĂŒ|goshamavapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamavapnĂŒ|gokishamavapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamavapshĂ«|shamavapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamavapnkshĂ«|goshamavapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamavapshĂ«|gokishamavapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamavapro|shamavapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamavapnkro|goshamavapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamavapro|gokishamavapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamavapmu|shamavapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamavapnkmu|goshamavapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamavapmu|gokishamavapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamavapsher|shamavapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamavapnksher|goshamavapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamavapsher|gokishamavapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamavapng|shamavapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamavapnkng|goshamavapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamavapng|gokishamavapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamavapya|shamavapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamavapnkya|goshamavapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamavapya|gokishamavapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamavapyam|shamavapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamavapnkyam|goshamavapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamavapyam|gokishamavapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamavapnĂŒshĂ«|shamavapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamavapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshamavapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamavapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishamavapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamavapnĂŒro|shamavapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamavapnknĂŒro|goshamavapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamavapnĂŒro|gokishamavapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamavapnĂŒmu|shamavapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamavapnknĂŒmu|goshamavapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamavapnĂŒmu|gokishamavapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamavapshĂ«nĂŒ|shamavapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamavapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshamavapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamavapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishamavapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamavapshĂ«ro|shamavapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamavapnkshĂ«ro|goshamavapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamavapshĂ«ro|gokishamavapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamavapshĂ«mu|shamavapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamavapnkshĂ«mu|goshamavapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamavapshĂ«mu|gokishamavapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamavapronĂŒ|shamavapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamavapnkronĂŒ|goshamavapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamavapronĂŒ|gokishamavapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamavaproshĂ«|shamavaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamavapnkroshĂ«|goshamavapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamavaproshĂ«|gokishamavaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamavapromu|shamavapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamavapnkromu|goshamavapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamavapromu|gokishamavapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamavapmunĂŒ|shamavapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamavapnkmunĂŒ|goshamavapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamavapmunĂŒ|gokishamavapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamavapmushĂ«|shamavapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamavapnkmushĂ«|goshamavapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamavapmushĂ«|gokishamavapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamavapmuro|shamavapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamavapnkmuro|goshamavapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamavapmuro|gokishamavapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
